operation.name: Insert
operation.sql: INSERT INTO file_references (ref_hash, domain, media_id, access_hash, object_id, origin_domain, origin_id, expire_at, revoked_at) VALUES (:ref_hash, :domain, :media_id, :access_hash, :object_id, :origin_domain, :origin_id, :expire_at, :revoked_at)

operation.name: SelectByRefHash
operation.sql: SELECT id, ref_hash, domain, media_id, access_hash, object_id, origin_domain, origin_id, expire_at, revoked_at, created_at FROM file_references WHERE ref_hash = :ref_hash LIMIT 1
